## Project Status
✅ **EN VIVO** en http://localhost:5174/

## Project Details
- **Type**: React 18 + Vite
- **Purpose**: Professional portfolio website with Home, Projects, About Me, Resume, and Contact sections
- **Design**: Modern dark theme, fully responsive, CSS styling only
- **Backend**: None required (static frontend)

## Architecture
- Components-based: Home, Projects, About, Resume (with Cover Letter), Contact
- All styling in CSS files (src/styles/)
- Responsive design for mobile, tablet, desktop
- Navigation con Header sticky
- Footer con enlaces sociales
- Resume section with downloadable CV (JSON, TXT formats)

## Available Scripts
- `npm run dev` - Inicia el servidor de desarrollo
- `npm run build` - Compila para producción
- `npm run preview` - Vista previa de la build
- `npm run lint` - Ejecuta eslint
